visa_types.name: Visa Types
visa_types.overview:
Short Stay (Visa C) – Tourism, Business, Conferences and Visiting relatives or friends (1 - 90 days)
As stated in the check list if you have an AMS Notification from Austrian Company we will assist you for the visa application. Embassy of Austria has decided to cooperate with an external service provider for the collection of applications while establishing the ‘one-stop’ principle for the lodging of applications, creates derogation from the general rule that an applicant must apply at the Austrian Visa Application Center in Malaysia.
Long Term (Visa D) – Short Term Study, Short-Term Work (91 days - 6 months)
Note: Applications for Austria Visa (D) is NOT accepted at the Visa Application Centre. Please visit the Austrian Embassy in Kuala Lumpur to lodge your visa application ( click here for embassy website (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/en/austrian-embassy-kuala-lumpur/your-travel-to-austria/entrance-and-residence/visa/))
visa_types.full_text:
Short Stay (Visa C) – Tourism, Business, Conferences and Visiting relatives or friends (1 - 90 days)
As stated in the check list if you have an AMS Notification from Austrian Company we will assist you for the visa application. Embassy of Austria has decided to cooperate with an external service provider for the collection of applications while establishing the ‘one-stop’ principle for the lodging of applications, creates derogation from the general rule that an applicant must apply at the Austrian Visa Application Center in Malaysia.
Long Term (Visa D) – Short Term Study, Short-Term Work (91 days - 6 months)
Note: Applications for Austria Visa (D) is NOT accepted at the Visa Application Centre. Please visit the Austrian Embassy in Kuala Lumpur to lodge your visa application ( click here for embassy website (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/en/austrian-embassy-kuala-lumpur/your-travel-to-austria/entrance-and-residence/visa/))

visa_types.name: Short Stay (Visa C)
visa_types.documents_required:
Application for Visa C - Tourism, Business, Conferences & Visiting relatives or friends (1 - 90 days) 
- Visa processing period approximately 14 working days
- Visa application to be submitted personally, finger prints required.
Requirements 
- Visa Application Form
- 1 Passport picture 3.5 x 4.5 cm (colour, high resolution, light background, frontal view, neutral facial expression, mouth close)
- Passport
- Malaysia residence permit for non-Malaysians
- Copy of birth certificate
- AMS notification by Austrian company
- Proof of accommodation in Austria
- Proof of Insurance coverage (medical insurance coverage for the whole period of stay in Austria; minimum insurance sum equivalent € 30,000)
- Letter by employer confirming income
- Travel itinerary
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table: Short Stay (Visa C)]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate and is subject to change.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS Global service charges and other charges) are to be paid in cash via local currency (i.e. Malaysia Ringgit) only.
- The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:
- Photocopying
- Photo services
- Courier service
- SMS Tracking Facility
- The visa fee shall be waived for applicants belonging to one of the following categories:
- children under six years;
- school pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research as defined in Recommendation No 2005/761/EC of the European Parliament
                                                                                        and of the Council of 28 September 2005 to facilitate the issue by the Member States of uniform short-stay visas for researchers from third countries travelling within
                                                                                        the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research ( 1 );
- representatives of non-profit organisation aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organised by non-profit
                                                                                        organisations.
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visa C - Tourism, Business, Conferences and Visiting relatives or friends (1 - 90 days)
As stated in the check list if you have an AMS Notification from Austrian Company we will assist you for the visa application. Embassy of Austria has decided to cooperate with an external
                                                                        service provider for the collection of applications while establishing the ‘one-stop’ principle for the lodging of applications, creates derogation from the general rule that an applicant
                                                                        must apply at the Austrian Visa Application Center in Malaysia.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Short Stay (Visa C)]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate and is subject to change.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS Global service charges and other charges) are to be paid in cash via local currency (i.e. Malaysia Ringgit) only.
- The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:
- Photocopying
- Photo services
- Courier service
- SMS Tracking Facility
- The visa fee shall be waived for applicants belonging to one of the following categories:
- children under six years;
- school pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research as defined in Recommendation No 2005/761/EC of the European Parliament
                                                                                        and of the Council of 28 September 2005 to facilitate the issue by the Member States of uniform short-stay visas for researchers from third countries travelling within
                                                                                        the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research ( 1 );
- representatives of non-profit organisation aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organised by non-profit
                                                                                        organisations.

## Documents Required
Application for Visa C - Tourism, Business, Conferences & Visiting relatives or friends (1 - 90 days) 
- Visa processing period approximately 14 working days
- Visa application to be submitted personally, finger prints required.
Requirements 
- Visa Application Form
- 1 Passport picture 3.5 x 4.5 cm (colour, high resolution, light background, frontal view, neutral facial expression, mouth close)
- Passport
- Malaysia residence permit for non-Malaysians
- Copy of birth certificate
- AMS notification by Austrian company
- Proof of accommodation in Austria
- Proof of Insurance coverage (medical insurance coverage for the whole period of stay in Austria; minimum insurance sum equivalent € 30,000)
- Letter by employer confirming income
- Travel itinerary

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to follow the below given guidelines:
- Photograph of size 35mm x 45 mm.
- Length of the head should not exceed 30 to 36 mm in length from chin to top of hair
- Photograph must be in color with light or White background
- Photograph for each visa applicant must be an un-mounted, full face photo, color photo as described below
- Photograph must have been taken within the last six months
- One photograph needs to be submitted

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
Application Form 
Document Checklist Business

Document Checklist Conference
Document Checklist Short term Studies or Language Course between 91 days and six month
Document Checklist Short Term Studies or Language Course up to 90 days
Document Checklist Tourist
Document Checklist Visiting Relatives or Friends

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Long Term (Visa D)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applications for Austria Visa (D) is NOT accepted at the Visa Application Centre. Please visit the Austrian Embassy in Kuala Lumpur to lodge your visa application (click here for embassy website (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/en/austrian-embassy-kuala-lumpur/your-travel-to-austria/entrance-and-residence/visa/))
